user_prompt: Reference images are Brazil and Japan World Cup team medals/emblems. Following the same style and format, generate another World Cup team emblem for Uzbekistan: a soccer ball combined with Uzbekistan flag shield. The shield is the UZBEKISTAN flag exactly: three horizontal bands blue(top) white(middle) green(bottom) separated by thin red lines, with a white crescent moon and twelve white stars in the top-left. Centered, ~80% of frame, white background.
